changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H60S'

changeSet.comment: Seed the EDAN H60S analyzer (SETUP status, HL7 v2.3.1; transport configured by the operator at deploy). fhir_uuid set explicitly to satisfy the NOT NULL + UNIQUE fhir_uuid constraint 004 adds, mirroring 052.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer (id, name, description, is_active, status, protocol_version, analyzer_type, fhir_uuid, last_updated) VALUES (nextval('clinlims.analyzer_seq'), 'EDAN H60S', 'EDAN H90-series hematology analyzer (H60S), HL7 MLLP', true, 'SETUP', 'HL7_V2_3_1', 'HEMATOLOGY', gen_random_uuid(), now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H60S';

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H60S'

changeSet.comment: Map the EDAN H60S CBC-6 wire codes (WBC/RBC/HGB/HCT/MCV/PLT) to the OE Test carrying each LOINC — reuses the LabSolution hematology catalog (same catalog dependency as 049/052), mapping only where the LOINC-bearing Test exists. H60S full 3-part-diff map extension is out of scope here (follow-up).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('WBC', '6690-2'), ('RBC', '789-8'), ('HGB', '718-7'), ('HCT', '4544-3'), ('MCV', '787-2'), ('PLT', '777-3') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'EDAN H60S' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);
